Title: ft_set_file
Feature: varcharft_set_file(tb, fname, delimiter, newline, esc, skip_rows)
Description: associates table with tabular data structure represented by CSV document content with external CSV file.
Associates table with tabular data structure represented by CSV document content with external CSV file.
Examples:
CREATE TABLE csv.tutorial.contacts
  (
    Id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    Fname VARCHAR(20),
    Sname VARCHAR(20),
    Age INTEGER,
    CONSTRAINT demo_table_pk PRIMARY KEY (Id)
  );

SQL>SELECT * FROM csv.tutorial.contacts;
Id                Fname     Sname       F_AGE
INTEGER NOT NULL  VARCHAR   VARCHAR     INTEGER
0                 John      Smith       48
1                 Anna      Clarks      62
2                 Rojer     Danrette    27
3                 Kate      Sigton      56
4                 Tim       Craft       41
5 Rows. -- 15 msec.
